title: QR Code
objectives: Explain QR structure and error correction
Distinguish plain QR from GS1 QR from Digital Link QR
Choose sizing + ECC level for real-world scanning

sections.markdown: **QR (Quick Response)** codes are 2D matrix barcodes with Reed-Solomon error correction, capable of encoding up to ~3 KB. Ubiquitous in consumer apps; the default 'scan this' code because every smartphone camera reads them natively.

sections.code:
Three flavors on GS1 products:
  1. Plain QR — arbitrary URL / text (marketing links)
  2. GS1 QR   — payload begins with FNC1, carries AIs like DataMatrix
  3. Digital Link QR — URL like https://id.gs1.org/01/...
                       (consumer-friendly + carries GS1 data)

sections.markdown: For consumer engagement, **Digital Link QR is the future**: same code serves POS, regulator, and consumer. Choose ECC ≥ M (higher for outdoor/damaged surfaces), and place a **quiet zone** (blank border) — most 'won't scan' complaints trace to no quiet zone or too small a code.
Embedding a giant logo covering >30% of the QR without upgrading to ECC-H. The code stops scanning. Always test on real devices with real lighting, not just the printer PDF.
Rule of thumb: minimum module (pixel) size = 0.4 mm printed; scan distance ≈ 10× code width. Sub-1cm codes are unreliable in real retail lighting.

flashcards.back: L (~7%) / M (~15%) / Q (~25%) / H (~30%) — higher = more damage tolerance but less capacity.
A blank margin around the code (usually ≥ 4 modules) required for scanners to detect it.
Plain QR (URL), GS1 QR (FNC1 + AIs), Digital Link QR (GS1-formatted URL).

quiz.q: For consumer engagement + POS on the same code use…
For a logo inside the QR you should…
quiz.explain: Higher ECC tolerates the covered area.

challenges.text: Generate a QR that encodes a URL.
Generate a GS1 QR with FNC1 + GTIN + batch + expiry.
Test scan reliability across ECC levels and module sizes.
Ship a labeling pipeline that auto-generates Digital Link QRs with brand logo overlay + quiet zone enforcement.

interviewQuestions: Plain vs GS1 vs Digital Link QR?
How do you size a QR for retail print?
